calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-19-2018 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-21-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Elizabeth Dupar specially appearing for Thomas Martin on behalf of James Dumas.

Ms. Dupar provided a copy of a fourth supplement and stated that the firearm was surrendered to the San Diego Sheriff's Office. The First and Final Report and Account, etc. is taken under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-23-2017 Continued To Sep-06-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-24-2017 Continued To Aug-23-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Harold Hewell specially appearing for Attorney Thomas Martin on behalf of James Dumas.

Mr. Hewell stated that he filed a second supplement to the petition on July 19th (copy provided in Court), that there is an outstanding issue of the firearm, that a Court order is required for transfer of the gun and that his Client would like to have the petition granted. The Court stated that it will sign an interim order regarding transfer of the gun. Mr. Hewell will provide a form of order. The First and Final Report and Account, etc. is continued to August 23, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-10-2017 Continued To Jul-24-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-26-2017 Continued To Jul-10-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
